title: lobelia puberula var. obtusifolia
intro: Lobelia puberula var. obtusifolia, also known as the sharp-leaved lobelia, is a plant species belonging to the Lobelia family, characterized by its distinctive leaf shape and purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, making it useful for treating various health issues such as muscle cramps and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Lobelia puberula var. obtusifolia include reducing anxiety and stress, as well as alleviating symptoms of bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are typically used to promote relaxation and ease respiratory issues.
